hero.desc: Editorial-grade formulas backed by science. Discover supplements designed for human performance and cellular vitality.

why_items.title: Premium Quality
why_items.desc: Formulas developed by leading scientists with the highest purity ingredients for maximum bioavailability.

why_items.title: Pure Ingredients
why_items.desc: No fillers, no artificial colorants. Only what your body needs, in its most natural and effective form.

why_items.title: Total Transparency
why_items.desc: Complete traceability of every batch. We publish our third-party analyses to ensure your peace of mind.

home.cta_desc: Start chatting with us now! Receive clinical advice and 15% off your first order.*
home.cta_disclaimer: *Applies to selected products from the gudd line.

productos.title: Find Your
productos.desc: Discover our curated selection of supplements and nutritional solutions designed to support every aspect of your cellular health.
productos.advisory_text: Not sure what to choose? Talk to a nutrition specialist.

articles.title: Collagen in Cellular Support: Beyond the Skin
articles.excerpt: New scientific evidence supports the use of type I and III collagen peptides for connective tissue maintenance. A deep analysis of the biological mechanisms.

articles.title: Magnesium and Deep Sleep: The Molecular Connection
articles.excerpt: We explore how different forms of magnesium affect sleep architecture and neuro-muscular recovery.

articles.title: Vitamin D3 + K2: Your Winter Ally
articles.excerpt: Why supplementing with D3 alone is insufficient and how K2 complements its function in bone and cardiovascular metabolism.

articles.title: Adaptogens and the Hypothalamic-Pituitary-Adrenal Axis
articles.excerpt: Ashwagandha, Rhodiola and Reishi: mechanisms of action on the stress axis supported by clinical trials.

articles.title: Gut Microbiome: The New Frontier of Systemic Wellness
articles.excerpt: Reprogramming gut flora with third-generation probiotics. Implications for immune, mental and metabolic health.

nosotros.desc: We were born from the need for supplements that truly deliver on their promises. Pure science, total transparency.
nosotros.story_p1: Advanced Health started in a small laboratory with a simple idea: nutrition should be treated with the same rigor as medicine.
nosotros.story_p2: Today, we collaborate with the world's best scientists and nutritionists to develop formulas that not only improve your health but optimize your life.
nosotros.story_p3: We don't aim to be the biggest brand, but the most trustworthy. That's why every batch of our products undergoes third-party testing to ensure purity and potency.

values.title: Applied Science
values.desc: We don't believe in trends, we believe in data. Every formula is the result of years of scientific research.

values.title: Absolute Purity
values.desc: We select only ingredients with the highest bioavailability, free from unnecessary fillers.

values.title: Human Performance
values.desc: Our mission is to enhance your biology so you can reach your maximum physical and mental potential.

soporte.title: We're Here to Help.
soporte.desc: Have a technical question or an order inquiry? Our clinical and support team is ready to assist you.

faqs.q: How can I track my order?
faqs.a: Once your order is shipped, you'll receive an email with the tracking number and a link for real-time tracking.
Yes, all our products comply with the highest quality standards and have valid health registrations.
We ship to all major and intermediate cities through our logistics partners.
If you're not satisfied with your purchase, you have up to 30 days to request an exchange or refund, as long as the product is sealed.

soporte.form_success_desc: We'll contact you within 24 business hours.
